typography.rules: Never use Inter. Use tracking-tight on headings. Ensure high contrast for all text.

colors.rules: Avoid purple and teal completely. Rely on the terracotta and deep green for CTA and gamification (streaks). Use sage for low-emphasis backgrounds like bot chat bubbles.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with dense functional grids where necessary.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align forms and dense content. Optical alignment over geometrical.
spacing_and_layout.rules: Mobile-first responsive. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision. Use grid-cols-1 on mobile.

components.buttons: Rounded-lg or rounded-full. Solid primary background for CTAs. Use terracotta for high-impact actions like 'Start Interview'. Explicit hover states required.
components.cards: Flat background (surface_primary), 1px subtle border (border), no deep shadow. On hover for interactive cards: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and soft ambient shadow.
components.forms: Use Shadcn customized inputs. Background surface_secondary, 1px border. Focus ring in primary color.
components.navigation: Sidebar for dashboard (compact, muted earthy accents). Sticky top nav for onboarding with solid background.
components.chat_interface: Bot bubbles: surface_secondary with text_main. User bubbles: primary with white text. High contrast, clear placeholder text, subtle typing indicators. No flashing.
components.gamification: Skill tree uses primary green for completed nodes, border-only for locked. Streak uses terracotta color and flame/leaf icon.
components.testing_requirements: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='start-interview-btn', data-testid='quiz-option-1').

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit text color changes, subtle transform (lift).
motion_and_interactions.chat: Smooth staggered entrance for chat messages.

image_urls.description: Calm study desk with morning sunlight
Green forest path with sunlight filtering through

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components are implemented in .js, not .tsx.
Strictly adhere to the Organic & Earthy archetype colors. DO NOT use generic SaaS blue or purple.
For the dashboard, use a dense 'Control Room' grid layout but maintain generous padding inside cards (minimum p-6) to avoid text collision.
For the AI Mock Interview screen, avoid a stressful timer-heavy look. Use the chat_interface guidelines to create a calm, mentor-like conversation flow.
Gamification elements (Streak, Skill Tree) should use Terracotta and Forest Green accents. Avoid neon or vibrating colors.
Always apply data-testid to buttons, inputs, links, and forms for testing.
